subcodes.title: Words spoken on 1913-09-04 in Ramleh
subcodes.first_line: Chastity and purity of life are the two divine standards of the spiritual and moral law.
subcodes.subjects: @courtesy; culture [adab], @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life, @serving humanity; working for progress, betterment of the world, @chastity and purity
